name: Sterling Tools Limited
summary: Sterling Tools Limited manufactures and markets high tensile cold forged fasteners to original equipment manufacturers in India. The company offers standard, special, chassis, and engine fasteners for use in passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, two wheelers, farm and construction equipment, and off-roadways. It also engages in leasing of immovable property; and manufacture and trading of motor control unit used in automobile industry. The company exports its products to Europe, the United States, South America, and the Middle East. Sterling Tools Limited was founded in 1979 and is based in Faridabad, India.
